failedAssertions.reason: Frontend form renders and validates correctly but backend POST /admin/users returns 500 for all payloads — persistent backend bug since Round 1. Confirmed still failing in Round 3.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No test users have MFA enabled in backend seed data — all users have mfaEnabled=false. Cannot test Disable MFA functionality. Dropdown actions now work (event propagation fixed) but MFA disable option not applicable.
No changelog entries exist in backend seed data. Page renders correct empty state. Blocked on seed data — confirmed across 3 rounds.
Requires changelog entries to trigger WhatsNew banner. No seed data entries exist. Blocked on test data — confirmed across 3 rounds.
Backend GET /audit/business-events returns HTTP 500 ('Failed to write request'). Frontend handles gracefully with error UI and retry. Backend bug — confirmed across 3 rounds.
Backend GET /admin/tenant-runtime/metrics returns HTTP 404 (endpoint doesn't exist). Security Policy section renders correctly. Blocked on backend endpoint — confirmed across 3 rounds.

fixesVerified: VAL-ADMIN-015: Approve dialog now has required reason textarea (fix from commit 203ff10). Approval flow works end-to-end.
